summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of audio widget with playhead synchronization. All critical features working correctly including the core playhead sync functionality.
passed_tests: Dark boutique aesthetic with correct colors (#121212 background, #1A1A1A widget, #D4AF37 gold accents)
Five audio tracks displayed with custom names (Midnight Sonata, Golden Hour Groove, Velvet Whispers, Obsidian Echoes, The Gilded Path)
Progress bar displays and updates during playback
CRITICAL: Playhead synchronization working perfectly (0.43s difference, well within tolerance)
Active track visual feedback working (gold highlight and left border)
Progress bar clickable seeking functionality working
Time display showing current time and duration correctly
Typography correctly implemented (Cormorant Garamond for titles, Manrope for labels)
Color scheme matches design guidelines (gold #D4AF37 for accents)
Pause and switch behavior preserves time position correctly
